急(hr).title: Stream the 124 best songs of 2024
急(hr).summary: NPR Music's list of the best songs of 2024 goes way past the top 10, or the entire Hot 100 for that matter, because if you're willing to dig a little, there's always something thrilling to discover.

急(hr).title: All Rap is Local: The Playlist
急(hr).summary: As it celebrates its 50th birthday, hip-hop is a global phenomenon. But to map the music's true impact, you have to look closer.

急(hr).title: Roséwave: 106 songs for the best summer ever!
急(hr).summary: Summer feels infinite, but also rushed in its impermanence. Roséwave bottles that infinity with a soundtrack that spans generations and genres of music.

急(hr).title: 40 Songs From 40 Years Of 'Weird Al' Yankovic
急(hr).summary: "Weird Al" Yankovic's self-titled debut came out 40 years ago, on May 3, 1983. So our resident super-fan listened to all of his songs and ranked the 40 best.

急(hr).title: Alt.Latino's Espooky Szn
急(hr).summary: The leaves are changing colors, miniature candies are lining the walls of drug stores and tías y tíos are warning about the demonic roots of Halloween. Finally, Espooky season has arrived.

急(hr).title: Chaotic Good: 30 bangers to keep that summer energy going
急(hr).summary: Say it ain't so, but summer's almost over. Keep Lady Gaga's party mantra — bus, club, another club, another club, plane, next place, no sleep — in your heart with this recklessly fun mix.

急(hr).title: Amor Perdido: 25 Latin ballads for summer heartbreak
急(hr).summary: There's no better tool for leaning into lost love than boleros, Bad Bunny and Chente.

急(hr).title: Coup de Foudre: 30 songs for your summer crush
急(hr).summary: Your eyes meet and you know it's too late. The French-speaking Montréalais call it un coup de foudre — love strikes  like a sudden thunderstorm. She makes you a playlist of her Canadian faves.

急(hr).title: Maggie Rogers' summer mixtape sweats with sweetness
急(hr).summary: Filled with pop mosaics, Surrender feels like a quintessentially summer album. Naturally, we asked Maggie Rogers for a roséwave playlist.

急(hr).title: Hunky Punky Poolboy: 23 bops and ballads for the summer stud
急(hr).summary: He's in Cannon Beach. He's at the Cape. He's in your dreams. He was raised on Aerosmith and Further Seems Forever. This is his soundtrack.

破(day).title: The developer of Tweakbench wants to remake the DAW without linear time
破(day).summary:
The Digital Audio Workstation can never quite escape the timeline and its roots in multitrack tape. Tweakbench's new Noemi, which entered alpha last month, starts from scratch. What if music in the DAW could constantly evolve and change? What if the DAW were non-deterministic?

破(day).title: OpenClaw上身机器人，AI不仅能帮订外卖，还能替你跑腿了
破(day).summary: 过去几年间，AI 主要停留在屏幕内，用于文字对话、内容生成或自动化脚本执行；但近日，随着 OpenClaw 生态的爆发式增长，两个依托于此的开源项目让智能体与物理世界之间的壁垒开始消融，这则振奋人心的消息，迅速点燃了全球机器人与 AI 社区的热情。2 月 23 日，在美国旧金山举办的 SF OpenClaw Hackathon 上，一个名为 ROSClaw 的项目拿到了冠军。Irvin 团队搭建了一个桥接层，把当下最火的开源 AI Agent 平台 OpenClaw 直接连到了真实的机器人硬件上。夺冠之后，团队随即宣布将其开源。（来源：X@irvinxyz）具体来看，他们通过智能插件层将 Op...
破(day).source: MIT 科技评论 - 本周热榜

序(month).title: 離散與重構：從媒體再現看移台港人的情感結構與身分認同
序(month).summary: 口述：陳嘉銘 (前國立政治大學臺灣史研究所客座學者)、撰稿：楊家瑜圖片來源：https://www.pexels.com/zh-tw/photo/3062541/https://medium.com/media/9dec2c3f15d2753ac1e548f3780367e4/href在2019年後的幾年間，香港與台灣之間的人口流動出現了歷史性的轉折。隨著社會政治環境的變遷，許多香港人選擇離開熟悉的家園，踏上移居台灣的旅程，這不僅僅是一次地理上的遷徙，更是一場關於身分、文化與情感的深層重構。本研究的起點，正源於自身的生命經驗，作為一名在2021年底移居台灣的香港學者，不僅是觀察者，更是親歷者。...
